Introduction

Rally Documentation

Welcome to Rally - the first decentralized, AI-powered marketing protocol where anyone can earn by sharing campaigns with their community.

Tweet. Engage. Earn. All On-Chain.

Rally revolutionizes how Web3 projects connect with real communities. Whether you’re a top KOL or just getting started—if you’ve got an X account and a following, you can participate.

🎉 Alpha Phase: Currently earning Rally Points.

Get Started

  • Getting Started → - New to Rally? Start here to learn the basics and get your account set up.
  • For Content Creators → - Learn how to find campaigns, complete missions, and maximize your earnings.
  • For Projects → - Launch AI-powered campaigns that reach real communities and drive authentic engagement.
  • Technical Docs → - Dive deep into Rally’s architecture, smart contracts, and developer tools.

Why Rally?

For Content Creators

  • No Barriers: Open to anyone with an X account
  • Instant Rewards: Get paid immediately upon verification
  • Fair Distribution: AI ensures quality engagement is rewarded

For Projects

  • Real Communities: Target genuine users, not bots
  • Pay for Performance: Only pay for verified engagement
  • On-Chain Analytics: Full transparency and attribution

Quick Links

  • Browse Active Campaigns 
  • Join Discord Community

Join the Community

  • Discord: Connect with other Rally users
  • X/Twitter: @RallyOnChain
